remediation_note: Re-executed by @governance-reviewer after the primary-agent attach_governance override landed in src/mcp_server/futureproof_server.py (lines 305-334). The pre-remediation run (mcp-bea-rpp-20260411T042033Z.json) showed MCP-BEA-002 FAIL because BaseMCPServer.attach_governance did not surface quality_tier. The override reads contract YAML directly and injects quality_tier + owner into the governance block on every response.
